emails.body:
BREAKING DEFENSE DAILY DIGEST — 30 SEP 2026

Top Stories:
• DoD releases FY27 budget posture statement emphasizing Pacific deterrence investments
• Army awards next-gen long-range fires prototype contracts to three vendors
• Navy completes first at-sea test of Project Overmatch mesh network on carrier strike group
• GAO report flags sustainment risks in F-35 engine supply chain

Policy & Budget:
• House Armed Services Committee marks up NDAA — markup includes $3.2B for Indo-Pacific posture initiatives
• Senate Appropriations releases defense bill with $850M increase for munitions replenishment

Industry:
• Lockheed Martin opens new hypersonics production facility in Courtland, AL
• Anduril raises Series F at $14B valuation

Opinion:
• "Why the Replicator Initiative needs a Phase 2" — editorial by Christian Brose

---

BREAKING DEFENSE DAILY DIGEST — 2 OCT 2026

Top Stories:
• SECDEF memo directs services to accelerate AI-enabled targeting workflows by FY28
• Air Force selects two vendors for Collaborative Combat Aircraft Phase 2 prototypes
• Space Force activates first operational tactical surveillance layer over INDOPACOM AOR
• DARPA announces breakthrough in cognitive electronic warfare — field demo slated for Q2 FY27

Policy & Budget:
• CBO scores Senate NDAA — projects $12B overrun in Columbia-class submarine program
• OMB issues new guidance on software acquisition pathways (Category 3)

Industry:
• RTX completes GTF engine inspection campaign — 98% fleet cleared for return to service
• Palantir wins $480M TITAN ground station follow-on contract

Analysis:
• "The munitions industrial base: progress and persistent gaps" — CSIS brief

BREAKING DEFENSE DAILY DIGEST — 3 OCT 2026

Top Stories:
• Joint Staff releases updated Joint Warfighting Concept — emphasizes cross-domain fires integration
• Navy christens USNS Robert F. Kennedy (T-AO 208) — sixth Ford-class oiler
• Army fields first battery of Precision Strike Missile (PrSM) Early Operational Capability
• CIA director testifies on emerging biotech threats at closed SSCI hearing

Policy & Budget:
• Continuing resolution passes House — funds government through 20 Dec at FY26 levels
• DoD issues interim policy on responsible AI in autonomous weapons systems

Industry:
• Northrop Grumman delivers first B-21 test article to Edwards AFB
• Shield AI acquires Heron Systems for cognitive autonomy stack

Podcast:
• New episode: "Inside the Replicator decision cycle" with former DIU director
